reconciliation.horizontal: The initial full-batch blind vote was too subtle, so three fresh reviewers received independently randomized focused difference sheets. All three classified Ash's head rotation correctly after the separating whole-eye controls were disabled.
reconciliation.vertical: The initial blind majority and all three focused reviewers classified the vertical pair correctly; the rendered bone10 coordinate delta also has the required screen-Y sign.
reconciliation.coefficient_action: whole-eye controls disabled before the final direction render; head coefficients unchanged after focused approval
